Translation.Text:
Mini-SG®
Do only use original female parts of the Mini-SG® System produced by Cendres+Métaux. For ordering please contact your local dealer or refer to http://www.cmsa.ch/dental
Mini-SG® is a registered Trademark.
Please refer to the Instruction for Use http://www.cmsa.ch/Dental/Download-Center/Documents The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the Instruction for Use.
Cendres+Métaux does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of Cendres+Métaux origins.
